ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. Contains both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) of the same certificate. Using ORIGINAL for verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. 2 pages. Issued by Derome Timber AB.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-409124' does not contain an LC reference in a bankterm context. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1, footer: 'Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige, Sverige'
Invoice page 2, footer: 'Derome Timber AB, Bjurumsvägen 14, 432 87 Veddige, Sverige'
secondary_locations_found: Invoice page 1, Invoice Address field: 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Derome Timber AB' identified in invoice footer on all pages
Consignee entity 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' identified in invoice Invoice Address field
VAT FI16497381 matches between certificate consignor block and invoice Tax Identity field
pairing_validation.reasoning: Multiple pairing criteria are satisfied: Derome Timber AB (the consignor acting on behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd) is found in the invoice footer as the issuer. Eagle Timber Oy Ltd is found in the Invoice Address field. VAT number FI16497381 matches. The certificate does not reference a specific invoice number, but consignor and consignee are confirmed.

consignor.certificate_value: Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland
consignor.invoice_value: Derome Timber AB (footer/issuer), EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD (Invoice Address), VAT: SE556550696001 (Derome), Tax Identity: FI16497381 (Eagle Timber)

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 – Corporate structure check for Derome Timber AB
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Derome Timber AB' in all invoice files and pages
comparison_steps.result: FOUND: 'Derome Timber AB' appears in invoice footer on page 1 and page 2 as the invoice issuer. Also the 'Derome' branding/logo appears in the invoice header.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Derome Timber AB is explicitly identifiable in the invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 – Corporate structure check for Eagle Timber Oy Ltd
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' in all invoice files and pages
comparison_steps.result: FOUND: 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD' appears in the Invoice Address field on page 1 of the invoice, with address 'Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND'.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Eagle Timber Oy Ltd is explicitly identifiable in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate consignor block names two entities: 'Derome Timber AB' acting on 'behalf of' 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd'. Both names are found in the invoice. Derome Timber AB is the invoice issuer (footer). Eagle Timber Oy Ltd is the Invoice Address (Bill-To) party. The certificate structure indicates Derome Timber AB is acting as agent/representative for Eagle Timber Oy Ltd. Both entities are explicitly present in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via 4.1.0
comparison_steps.conclusion: Consignor entities verified.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states consignor country as Finland. Invoice Address for Eagle Timber Oy Ltd shows FINLAND. VAT FI16497381 in certificate matches Tax Identity FI16497381 in invoice. FI prefix confirms Finland.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH
comparison_steps.conclusion: Country verified as Finland via both explicit address and VAT prefix.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Verification of company name and country
Country verification via indirect identifiers – VAT prefix FI confirms Finland

consignor.motivation: The certificate consignor field lists 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' with address in Finland and VAT FI16497381. The invoice is issued by Derome Timber AB (footer) and invoiced to Eagle Timber Oy Ltd at Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 Helsinki, Finland. The Tax Identity on the invoice is FI16497381, matching exactly. Both entities from the certificate consignor block are explicitly present in the invoice. Country Finland is confirmed via the Invoice Address ('FINLAND') and VAT prefix 'FI'. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland'. Invoice issuer: 'Derome Timber AB' (footer). Invoice Address: 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND'. Tax Identity: FI16497381. Both names found. Country Finland confirmed. Rule 4.1.0 applies – corporate structure match. No need to proceed to 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.

consignee.certificate_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Invoice Address: EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND; Delivery Address: C5, Kinnared Stuffning, Marknadsvägen, 314 05 Kinnared, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in the Invoice Address / Bill-To field.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. Invoice Address field contains 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND'. This is a different legal entity.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Certificate consignee not found in primary billing field.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 – Priority 2: Secondary fields (Delivery Address, Ship To)
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in delivery address or other secondary fields.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. Delivery Address is 'C5, Kinnared Stuffning, Marknadsvägen, 314 05 Kinnared, SWEDEN'. No mention of Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Certificate consignee not found in any invoice field.

comparison_steps.description: Full text search for 'Mounzer' or 'Sammakieh' or 'EST' (as establishment) anywhere in invoice pages 1 and 2.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. The name 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' does not appear anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.conclusion: MISMATCH – consignee cannot be identified in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Saudi Arabia. No party in the invoice is located in Saudi Arabia.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH
comparison_steps.conclusion: Country Saudi Arabia not found for any party in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification – primary billing field checked first, then secondary fields
Search in all invoice blocks including Delivery Address, Receiver, Dealer, Importer
MISMATCH – consignee company name cannot be identified in the invoice

consignee.motivation: The certificate consignee is 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' located in Saudi Arabia. The invoice's Invoice Address (Bill-To) party is 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD' in Finland. The Delivery Address is in Kinnared, Sweden with no company name matching the consignee. A full text search of both invoice pages finds no occurrence of 'Mounzer', 'Sammakieh', or any reference to Saudi Arabia. The certificate consignee cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. This is a clear MISMATCH – the consignee in the certificate is a completely different entity from any party mentioned in the invoice.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia'. Invoice has two address blocks: (1) Invoice Address: 'EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND' and (2) Delivery Address: 'C5, Kinnared Stuffning, Marknadsvägen, 314 05 Kinnared, SWEDEN'. Neither mentions the certificate consignee. No match possible. Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) not applicable because the consignee does not appear in any Ship-To field either. Result: MISMATCH per 4.2.4.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain article numbers. Proceed to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.conclusion: No article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate goods description.
comparison_steps.result: The identity-bearing main designation is 'Whitewood'. This is the product name that identifies the goods.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Main designation: 'Whitewood'

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Whitewood' in invoice goods descriptions.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. All 5 invoice lines contain 'Whitewood Sawn board' as the product description. 'Whitewood' is explicitly present as the first word in each line's description.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice adds 'Sawn board VI+ 25x100' and dimension specifications. These are additional specifications that do not change the product identity.
comparison_steps.result: Additional specifications in invoice do not alter product identity. Certificate uses general term 'Whitewood'; invoice provides detailed specifications. Per 4.3.4, additional text before/after the main designation does not cause MISMATCH when the identity-bearing main designation is found.
comparison_steps.conclusion: MATCH – additional specifications are non-identity-bearing additions.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' identified in both documents
Additional specifications in invoice ('Sawn board VI+ 25x100') are non-identity-bearing additions

goods_description.motivation: The certificate describes goods as 'Whitewood'. The invoice lists 5 lines all describing 'Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100' with various lengths. The identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' is explicitly present in all invoice lines. The additional text 'Sawn board VI+ 25x100' and dimension specifications are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Whitewood 74 Packages / Whitewood'. Invoice goods: 'Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 3,0 m' (and similar for lines 2-5). Main designation 'Whitewood' is found as the first word in every invoice line. The additions 'Sawn board', 'VI+', '25x100', dimension are specifications that don't change product identity. Rule 4.3.4 applies. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for the numeric value 282.262 in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. The invoice does not contain a total quantity row showing 282.262 m3 or nm3. Individual line quantities are listed but no total.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Direct identification fails. Proceed to exceptions.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '282,262m3' in box 7. Numeric value: 282.262. Unit: m3 (cubic meters). Both numeric value and unit are present.
comparison_steps.result: Requirements met.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Valid quantity specification.

comparison_steps.description: Only one invoice is present.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Proceed to 3B.

comparison_steps.description: Units are m3/nm3, not MT or KG.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Proceed to 3C.

comparison_steps.description: Multiple article lines, not a single line.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Proceed to 3D.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.5 – Exception 3D (summation of multiple rows within same invoice)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states total quantity 282.262 m3. Invoice has 5 lines of Whitewood Sawn board with quantities in nm3: 57.8025, 28.38, 92.223, 16.77, 87.08625. All lines are same product type (Whitewood Sawn board) and same unit (nm3). Sum: 57.8025 + 28.38 + 92.223 + 16.77 + 87.08625 = 282.26175 nm3.
comparison_steps.result: Sum = 282.26175. Certificate value = 282.262. Difference = 282.262 - 282.26175 = 0.00025. Tolerance check: ±0.1% of 282.262 = 0.282262. Actual difference (0.00025) < tolerance (0.282262). Also within ±0.001. MATCH within tolerance.
comparison_steps.conclusion: MATCH via Exception 3D. The small difference (0.00025) is due to decimal truncation in the certificate and is well within the ±0.1% tolerance.

rules_applied.description: Exception 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice. Five Whitewood Sawn board lines summed.
Tolerance ±0.1% applied to summation result. Difference 0.00025 within tolerance 0.282.

quantity.motivation: The certificate states 282,262m3 (282.262 m³) in box 7. The invoice contains 5 lines of Whitewood Sawn board with quantities in nm3. All lines are the same product (Whitewood) from the same invoice. Summation per Exception 3D: 57.8025 + 28.38 + 92.223 + 16.77 + 87.08625 = 282.26175 nm3. The difference from the certificate value (282.262 - 282.26175 = 0.00025) is within the ±0.1% tolerance (0.282). The unit difference between 'm3' and 'nm3' does not cause MISMATCH per 4.4.3 which states 'Fakturan behöver INTE ange samma kvantitetsenhet som certifikatet'. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate: 282,262m3 = 282.262 m³. Invoice lines (nm3): 57.8025 + 28.38 + 92.223 + 16.77 + 87.08625 = 282.26175. Diff: 0.00025, tolerance 0.1% = 0.282. 0.00025 < 0.282. All 5 lines are same product (Whitewood Sawn board), same unit (nm3), same invoice. Exception 3D conditions all met. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice page 2 states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. This is an explicit origin field.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Origin explicitly stated in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. Case normalization.
comparison_steps.result: SWEDEN = Sweden after case normalization.
comparison_steps.conclusion: MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: The certificate states origin as 'SWEDEN' in box 3. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' on page 2. After case normalization, these are identical. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice page 2: 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exact match after case normalization. Rule 4.5.1 satisfied with explicit origin field. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: NOT APPLICABLE – no LC reference found

rule_evaluation_log.description: Document pairing – Certificate file (Document A) contains ORIGINAL (p1) and COPY (p2). Using ORIGINAL. Invoice file (Document B) is the separate invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: PASSED – Consignor (Derome Timber AB) found in invoice, Consignee entity (Eagle Timber Oy Ltd) found in invoice

rule_evaluation_log.description: Corporate structure – consignor names found in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: APPLIED – Both 'Derome Timber AB' and 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' found explicitly in invoice

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via VAT prefix – FI16497381 confirms Finland

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: APPLIED – Primary billing field: EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD (not matching). Secondary fields: no match. Full search: no match.
NOT APPLICABLE – Certificate consignee does not appear in any Ship-To/Delivery field
MISMATCH – Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST not found anywhere in invoice
MATCH – 'Whitewood' found in all invoice lines
APPLIED – 'Sawn board VI+ 25x100' treated as non-identity additions
FAILED – 282.262 not found as a single value in invoice
NOT APPLICABLE – multiple lines, not single line

rule_evaluation_log.description: Exception 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: APPLIED – Sum of 5 Whitewood lines = 282.26175 nm3, certificate = 282.262 m3. Diff = 0.00025. Within ±0.1% tolerance. MATCH.
FOUND – 'Country of origin: Sweden' on page 2

rule_evaluation_log.description: Origin normalization – case normalization SWEDEN = Sweden

rejected_hypotheses.reason: The certificate consignee 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' does not appear in any Ship-To or Delivery Address field in the invoice. The delivery address is in Kinnared, Sweden with no named company matching the consignee. Rule 4.2.0.3 cannot be applied.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee found somewhere in invoice text
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Full text search of both invoice pages yields no occurrence of 'Mounzer', 'Sammakieh', 'Saudi Arabia', or any variant. The consignee is completely absent from the invoice.
The value 282.262 does not appear as a single number anywhere in the invoice. The invoice has no total quantity row. Summation via Exception 3D was required.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' i Saudiarabien kan inte återfinnas någonstans i fakturan. Fakturan är ställd till 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' i Finland med leveransadress i Kinnared, Sverige. Övriga kontrollpunkter (avsändare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer överens.
blocking_issues: Consignee 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' (Saudi Arabia) cannot be identified in the invoice. Invoice is addressed to 'Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' (Finland) with delivery to Kinnared, Sweden.

human_readable_report.title: Verification Report – Certificate of Origin vs Invoice

sections.certificate_value: Derome Timber AB behalf of Eagle Timber Oy Ltd, Mikonkatu 22B23, VAT: FI16497381, 00100, Helsinki, Finland
sections.invoice_value: Derome Timber AB (issuer/footer), EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD (Invoice Address), Tax Identity: FI16497381, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND
sections.rule_applied: Corporate structure – both Derome Timber AB and Eagle Timber Oy Ltd explicitly present in invoice
sections.motivation: Both entities named in the certificate consignor field (Derome Timber AB and Eagle Timber Oy Ltd) are explicitly identified in the invoice. Country Finland confirmed via explicit address and VAT prefix FI.

sections.certificate_value: Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST, 31 Al Islam Street, Al Hamra, Jedda, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Invoice Address: EAGLE TIMBER OY LTD, Mikonkatu 22 B 23, 00100 HELSINKI, FINLAND. Delivery Address: C5, Kinnared Stuffning, Marknadsvägen, 314 05 Kinnared, SWEDEN.
sections.rule_applied: Consignee not identifiable in any invoice field – neither primary billing nor secondary delivery fields contain the certificate consignee
sections.motivation: The certificate names 'Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in Saudi Arabia as consignee. This entity does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice is addressed to Eagle Timber Oy Ltd (Finland) with delivery to Kinnared (Sweden). No reference to the certificate consignee exists in the invoice. MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Whitewood Sawn board VI+ 25x100 (5 lines with different lengths)
sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation 'Whitewood' found in all invoice lines; additional specifications are non-identity-bearing
sections.motivation: The certificate describes 'Whitewood'. All 5 invoice lines describe 'Whitewood Sawn board' with dimensional specifications. The main product designation 'Whitewood' is explicitly present. Additional text is non-identity-bearing per rule 4.3.4. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Exception 3D – Summation of 5 Whitewood Sawn board lines. Sum 282.26175 vs certificate 282.262. Difference 0.00025 within ±0.1% tolerance.
sections.motivation: The certificate states 282.262 m³. The invoice has no total quantity row but 5 individual lines totaling 282.26175 nm³. The difference (0.00025) is within the ±0.1% tolerance. All lines are same product and same unit. Exception 3D applies. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Explicit origin field in invoice matches certificate after case normalization
sections.motivation: Certificate states 'SWEDEN' in box 3. Invoice page 2 states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exact match after case normalization. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Verification result: NOT IDENTICAL. The consignee in the certificate ('Mounzer Hazem Sammakieh EST' in Saudi Arabia) cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. The invoice is addressed to a completely different party ('Eagle Timber Oy Ltd' in Finland). All other checkpoints (consignor, goods description, quantity, and country of origin) match successfully. Manual handling is required due to the consignee mismatch.

output_quality_checks.notes: One MISMATCH on consignee checkpoint → comparison_result correctly set to NOT_IDENTICAL. All other checkpoints MATCH. Consistency verified.
